scope: extend _SIGNAL_PREFIX to all 19 signals to eliminate broken fallback prefixes (byp-, cog-, dea-)
add 6 missing signals to drift explain (COD, CCC, CXS, FOE, CIR, DCA) for full 19/19 coverage
add signal_abbrev field to fix-plan task dicts for direct drift-explain integration
extend _ABBREV_TO_SIGNAL to 19 signals so resolve_signal() works for CXS, FOE, CIR, DCA
add in_scope_accept to drift diff for noise-independent scoped acceptance gating
improve out_of_scope_diff_noise next-action guidance with concrete resolution path
notes: Analysis of real-world agent workflow exposed that 13 of 19 signals lacked consistent abbreviations, causing agents to hallucinate signal names (COG, DEA) from broken task-ID prefixes.
drift explain coverage gap directly caused agent failure when trying to look up DCA after seeing a dea- task ID.
in_scope_accept allows agents to make a scoped go/no-go decision without being blocked by pre-existing out-of-scope diff noise.
All changes are backward-compatible: signal field in fix-plan tasks is still present (unchanged), signal_abbrev is additive.
